mapper.select:
select * from gb_department_goods_stock
limit #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(*) from gb_department_goods_stock

select * from gb_department_goods_stock as gdgs left join gb_distributer_goods as gdg on gdg.gb_distributer_goods_id = gdgs.gb_dgs_gb_dis_goods_id where gb_dgs_gb_department_father_id = #{depFatherId}
mapper.delete:
delete from gb_department_goods_stock where gb_department_goods_stock_id in
#{gbDepartmentGoodsStockId}
